phase: REELFORGE PHASE 69.8B — PUBLIC EXPERIENCE TRUTH AUDIT

elements.name: Homepage
elements.forensicNotes: Top-level `main` renders hero, discovery, creator profile, support (monetization hub), and feed shell for non-admin users.

elements.name: Hero
elements.forensicNotes: Hero stage is always rendered via `HeroExperienceBridge` in public flow.

elements.name: Marketplace
elements.forensicNotes: No `data-marketplace-dashboard` on public page; marketplace dashboard lives inside studio command center/admin workflows.

elements.name: Creator cards
elements.forensicNotes: Both hero featured creator module (`data-featured-creator-module`) and creator profile block (`data-creator-profile`) render for normal users.

elements.name: Notifications
elements.forensicNotes: Notification center bell is visible in header; panel content is conditional on user interaction.

elements.name: Daily engagement
elements.forensicNotes: `data-daily-engagement` only appears in studio workspace sections.

elements.name: Continue watching
elements.forensicNotes: `data-watch-continue` is inside `StudioExperience` command center context; not present on public landing page.

elements.name: Series
elements.forensicNotes: Dedicated series panels/drawers are not rendered in idle public homepage state; series metadata appears contextually in feed/theater interactions.

elements.name: Support section
elements.forensicNotes: Public support CTA is exposed as `MonetizationHub` (`data-monetization-hub`, title 'Support ReelForge').

adminGatedButReachableByOverlay.normalUserResult: Opens studio overlay with admin login panel; full studio modules remain admin-gated.
